name: ai-software-builder-backend
description: Express + MongoDB backend for an AI Software Builder MVP.

scripts.check: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter *.js -Recurse | ForEach-Object { node --check $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
